title: General Office Submittals and Turnover Requirements
reference: Office-approved project delivery and turnover requirements.

clauses.scope: In addition to the technical requirements of the work item, comply with office documentation, submittal, and turnover requirements.
references: Approved project TOR, BOQ, drawings, and implementation instructions
submittals: Shop drawings and coordination drawings where required
Method statement and work schedule when required
As-built drawings prior to final turnover
Operation and maintenance manuals for equipment-based systems
execution: Coordinate the work with existing site conditions and other trades to minimize rework and conflicts.
testing: Submit test reports, inspection reports, and commissioning records as applicable.
special_notes: Final acceptance may require completion of punch list, submission of as-builts, test reports, warranties, and turnover documents.

title: Low-Current Coordination Requirements
reference: Office-approved coordination notes for low-current systems.

clauses.scope: Where low-current systems are included, coordinate pathways, support requirements, termination points, and testing protocols with the owner and specialist provider.
materials: Use approved cables, devices, racks, accessories, and labeling materials suitable for the intended low-current application.
execution: Coordinate conduit and cable tray routing early
Provide labeling and segregation from power systems where required
testing: Functional testing, device addressing, and integration tests where applicable
special_notes: Coordinate internet, voice, CCTV, and FDAS requirements with the end-user and ICT/security focal persons where applicable.

title: Contractor Qualification and Experience Note
reference: Office standard note for specialized or sensitive works.

submittals: Statement of similar completed projects when required by procurement documents
special_notes: For specialized scopes, contractor experience in similar work may be required subject to procurement rules and approved TOR.
